narration: Intervals before the new interval stay the same if they end before the new interval starts.
The new interval overlaps with [1, 3], so it grows into [1, 5].
decision: Overlapping intervals merge into one larger interval.

narration: Now [6, 9] starts after 5, so it belongs after the merged new interval.
callout: The final answer keeps before, merged, and after parts in order.
